International Workshop on the Historical Heritage of Abruzzo

Zeynep Burçoğlu

, our student at the KHAS Department of Art and Design, Design Thesis Master’s Program, will take part as a facilitator in the “

Historical Heritage of Abruzzo International Workshop

” to be held on

July 20-27, 2024

. The event, in which Kadir Has University Faculty of Art and Design Dean

Prof. Dr. Banu MANAV

is a member of the scientific committee, is coordinated by the Università degli Studi di Chieti – Pescara and the Università degli Studi di Firenze.

We wish success to our student Zeynep Burçoğlu, who is taking part in this international workshop, which is the first step of the collaboration signed with Kadir Has University and Università degli Studi di Chieti – Pescara.
